race.comment: BLUEPINOT (13) stalked the pace then was far too good over this distance at Doomben last start when second-up from a spell. Tackling a better race today but drops a huge 6kgs and has further improvement to come. Consistent sprinter DAGGERS (6) led and looked home only to be nailed by a couple near the line recently over 1400m at Eagle Farm. Has a very strong SP profile this prep but is not turning a profit for followers. Sure to be highly competitive again. OUROBOROS (3) goes fast but is on trial at 1350m so the final 100m might be an issue. YES LULU (1) is the other to consider. Much improved run when placed second up and gets a cheap trail here from one.
